# Privacy Blocklist — Athena-Public
# Single source of truth for patterns that must NEVER appear in the public repo.
# Used by: pre-commit hook, privacy_scan.py, bilateral sync
#
# Format: one regex pattern per line. Lines starting with # are comments.
# Case-insensitive matching is applied automatically.

# === PERSONAL NAMES ===
Weng Wah
Yap Weng Wah
Jun Kai
Jeremy Tan
Rui Yi
Theng Xuan

# === CLIENT IDENTIFIERS ===
Supermono

# === PERSONAL CONTACT ===
# Actual email and phone patterns stored in .env (not committed).
# The privacy_scan.py reads these from environment variables.
# Format: PRIVACY_EMAIL_PATTERN and PRIVACY_PHONE_PATTERN in .env
[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,}
\b(\+?65[\s-]?)?[89]\d{3}[\s-]?\d{4}\b

# === LOCAL FILE PATHS ===
file:///Users/winstonkoh
/Users/winstonkoh/Desktop
/Users/winstonkoh/Project Athena

# === PRIVATE PSYCHOLOGY ===
limerence
PEF Ruin
Psychology_L1L5
L1-L5.*trauma
reparenting

# === SEXUAL / EXPLICIT ===
\bseduction\b
\bvirgin\b
\bthreesome\b
\bescort\b
\brape\b
\bPimp/Madam\b
sexual economics

# === PRIVATE DOMAINS ===
Playbook_Seduction
escalation_ladder_framework

# === SECRETS / CREDENTIALS ===
# Value-format patterns — match actual secret material, not documentation
# that merely names a variable. Added 2026-06-10 after a bypass test
# (TD-027 item 4) proved a SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY assignment passed
# the PII-only blocklist. Use pds:allow for documented fake examples.
eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_\-]{10,}\.[A-Za-z0-9_\-]{4,}
sk-[A-Za-z0-9_\-]{20,}
AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}
AIza[0-9A-Za-z_\-]{30,}
ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{36}
-----BEGIN [A-Z ]*PRIVATE KEY-----
(SERVICE_ROLE|API_KEY|SECRET_KEY|ACCESS_TOKEN|SERVICE_KEY)[A-Z_]*\s*[=:]\s*['"]?[A-Za-z0-9_\-\.]{16,}
